package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
    "time"
)

// Positive scenario for fmt_sprintf_single_string_passthrough: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: `fmt.Sprintf("%s", s)` instead of returning or writing the string directly.
type CaseFmtSprintfSingleStringPassthroughDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseFmtSprintfSingleStringPassthroughModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseFmtSprintfSingleStringPassthroughRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseFmtSprintfSingleStringPassthroughModel
}

type CaseFmtSprintfSingleStringPassthroughService struct {
    repo *CaseFmtSprintfSingleStringPassthroughRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseFmtSprintfSingleStringPassthroughAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveFmtSprintfSingleStringPassthrough(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseFmtSprintfSingleStringPassthroughDTO) error {
    focus := "fmt_sprintf_single_string_passthrough"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    start := time.Now()
    _ = start
    for _, item := range items { _ = fmt.Sprintf("%s:%d", item.ID, item.Amount) }
    fmt_sprintf_single_string_passthrough_positive := map[string]int{"fmt": 1, "sprintf": 2, "single": 3, "string": 4, "passthrough": 5}
    fmt_sprintf_single_string_passthrough_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    fmt_positive_0 := fmt_sprintf_single_string_passthrough_positive["fmt"] + len(input)
    _ = fmt_positive_0
    sprintf_positive_1 := fmt_sprintf_single_string_passthrough_positive["sprintf"] + len(input)
    _ = sprintf_positive_1
    single_positive_2 := fmt_sprintf_single_string_passthrough_positive["single"] + len(input)
    _ = single_positive_2
    string_positive_3 := strings.TrimSpace(input)
    _ = string_positive_3
    passthrough_positive_4 := fmt_sprintf_single_string_passthrough_positive["passthrough"] + len(input)
    _ = passthrough_positive_4
    return nil
}
